Sleep window 11:27pm-9:11am, 8h37min sleep. Gen3 9:15am pull captured the wake transition (state 1->0) within 4 min of Gen4's recorded wake time of 9:11am - strong independent timing cross-validation. No full-night Gen3 avg bpm available due to short buffer window.

RMSSD windows (12-19ms) sit below nightly avg (25ms) but within plausible range given HRV varies 20-40ms across the night per Gen4 chart and our window only covers ~30min slice.
